<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get capabilities"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/capabilities"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns information about what features are available based on environment configuration

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}
  responses={{"200":{"description":"OK","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"Information about what features are enabled via environment configuration","properties":{"ai_providers":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"embedding":{"description":"Embedding lists providers available for embedding service","items":{"enum":["openai","anthropic","ollama","cohere","voyage"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["AIProviderOpenAI","AIProviderAnthropic","AIProviderOllama","AIProviderCohere","AIProviderVoyage"]},"type":"array"},"llm":{"description":"LLM lists providers available for LLM service","items":{"enum":["openai","anthropic","ollama","cohere","voyage"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["AIProviderOpenAI","AIProviderAnthropic","AIProviderOllama","AIProviderCohere","AIProviderVoyage"]},"type":"array"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"AIProviders lists AI providers available for embedding and LLM"},"features":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"bm25_search":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"active":{"description":"Active indicates both available AND enabled","type":"boolean"},"available":{"description":"Available indicates if the backend is configured and healthy","type":"boolean"},"enabled":{"description":"Enabled indicates if the user has enabled this capability","type":"boolean"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"BM25Search indicates BM25 keyword search capability state (requires search engine)"},"embedding_indexing":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"active":{"description":"Active indicates both available AND enabled","type":"boolean"},"available":{"description":"Available indicates if the backend is configured and healthy","type":"boolean"},"enabled":{"description":"Enabled indicates if the user has enabled this capability","type":"boolean"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"EmbeddingIndexing indicates embedding indexing capability state (requires embedding service + vector store)"},"text_indexing":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"active":{"description":"Active indicates both available AND enabled","type":"boolean"},"available":{"description":"Available indicates if the backend is configured and healthy","type":"boolean"},"enabled":{"description":"Enabled indicates if the user has enabled this capability","type":"boolean"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"TextIndexing indicates BM25 text indexing capability state (requires search engine e.g. OpenSearch)"},"vector_search":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"active":{"description":"Active indicates both available AND enabled","type":"boolean"},"available":{"description":"Available indicates if the backend is configured and healthy","type":"boolean"},"enabled":{"description":"Enabled indicates if the user has enabled this capability","type":"boolean"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"VectorSearch indicates vector similarity search capability state (requires embedding service + vector store)"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"Features lists feature flags"},"limits":{"allOf":[{"properties":{"max_results_per_page":{"description":"MaxResultsPerPage is the maximum results per page","type":"integer"},"max_workers":{"description":"MaxWorkers is the maximum number of sync workers","type":"integer"},"sync_max_interval":{"description":"SyncMaxInterval is the maximum sync interval in minutes","type":"integer"},"sync_min_interval":{"description":"SyncMinInterval is the minimum sync interval in minutes","type":"integer"}},"type":"object"}],"description":"Limits defines operational boundaries from environment configuration"},"oauth_providers":{"description":"OAuthProviders lists OAuth providers configured via environment variables","items":{"enum":["github","gitlab","bitbucket","slack","discord","msteams","notion","confluence","google_docs","jira","linear","google_drive","dropbox","onedrive","s3","localfs","zendesk","intercom"],"type":"string","x-enum-varnames":["ProviderTypeGitHub","ProviderTypeGitLab","ProviderTypeBitbucket","ProviderTypeSlack","ProviderTypeDiscord","ProviderTypeMSTeams","ProviderTypeNotion","ProviderTypeConfluence","ProviderTypeGoogleDocs","ProviderTypeJira","ProviderTypeLinear","ProviderTypeGoogleDrive","ProviderTypeDropbox","ProviderTypeOneDrive","ProviderTypeS3","ProviderTypeLocalFS","ProviderTypeZendesk","ProviderTypeIntercom"]},"type":"array"}},"type":"object"}}}},"500":{"description":"Internal server error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"description":"API error response","properties":{"error":{"example":"invalid request body","type":"string"}},"type":"object"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
